Name: Jasper RPR Events
Description: General-purpose Reaper event profile for PvE. Broken references and field-content-specific events were removed for stable roulette and raid use.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles OOC
Events.Description: Restores normal Reaper ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Feint TB
Events.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Events.Name: Arcane Crest Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Arcane Crest when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 70%
Conditions.Description: Self HP safety threshold for personal mitigation.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles OOC
Logics.Description: Restores normal Reaper ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Logics.Name: Feint TB
Logics.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Logics.Name: Arcane Crest Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Arcane Crest when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.
